title: Langley Air Force Base Drone Incursions — 17 Consecutive Nights
detail: Unknown drones penetrate restricted airspace over Langley Air Force Base, Virginia, for 17 consecutive nights beginning in December 2024. F-22 Raptors are scrambled in response. The Pentagon confirms the incursions but cannot publicly identify the operators or origin of the drones. The Wall Street Journal breaks the story, reporting that the incidents prompted a significant military response and inter-agency investigation. The episode reignites debate over whether unexplained aerial intrusions over sensitive military installations are adequately addressed.
